'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 28''', also styled as '''''Star Wars'' Magazine 28''',  was the 28th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]''.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Prequel Update]]
*[[Jawa's Corner]]
*The Cantina
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*"[[I Was a Teenage Sith Lord: Introducing Anakin Skywalker]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 50|''Star Wars Insider'' 50]]}}
*"[[Ralph McQuarrie & Doug Chiang: Visualizing a Galaxy Far, Far Away...]]" {{C|from ''Star Wars Insider'' 50}}
*Darth Vader Poster
*"[[Trail of the Bounty Hunters]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 49|''Star Wars Insider'' 49]]}}
